instructions: Use the 720p dark cinematic template we created together. Apply it to all 15 slides. This prompt only defines the content for each slide — do not override the template's design, colors, fonts, or layout rules.

slides.title: Title Slide
slides.headline: Urban Solutions
slides.speaker_notes: Introduce Urban Solutions as a cutting-edge 3D real estate software company that transforms property exploration from static brochures to fully immersive, interactive digital environments.

slides.title: The Problem
slides.speaker_notes: The real estate industry still relies on 2D floor plans, static renders, and PDF brochures. Buyers can't truly experience a property before it's built. Urban Solutions bridges this gap with real-time 3D powered by Unreal Engine.

slides.title: The Solution
slides.headline: One Platform. Complete Property Experience.
slides.subtext: From exterior visualization to interior walkthroughs, apartment filtering to AI-powered assistance — all in real-time 3D.
slides.speaker_notes: Our platform combines React for the UI with Unreal Engine 5 for photorealistic rendering. Buyers can explore buildings as if physically present. Every interaction happens in real-time with no loading screens.
slides.screenshot_instructions: Capture the home page at sunset with cloudy weather, showing sidebar navigation, camera controls, and time/weather controls.

slides.title: 3D Building Visualization
slides.headline: Real-Time Atmosphere Control
features: 5 times of day: Dawn · Morning · Noon · Sunset · Night
4 weather modes: Clear · Cloudy · Rainy · Foggy
3 camera presets: Exterior · Aerial · Street Level
slides.speaker_notes: The building is rendered in Unreal Engine 5 with full dynamic lighting and weather. Users switch between 5 times of day and 4 weather conditions in real-time. Camera presets provide instant exterior, aerial, or street-level perspectives. Auto-rotate creates a cinematic showcase.
slides.screenshot_instructions: 4 screenshots in a 2×2 grid: dawn+clear, noon+cloudy, sunset+rainy, night+foggy.

slides.title: Apartment Filtering & Browser
slides.headline: Find the Perfect Unit in Seconds
features: Filter by: bedrooms, bathrooms, price, surface, floor, orientation, building, type
Real-time search across all unit properties
Click a unit → camera flies to it in 3D
Hover a unit → it highlights in the 3D building
Detail drawer with full specs and actions
slides.speaker_notes: The apartment browser is the core of the Advanced Package. Units are fetched from a live database. Every filter change updates both the list and the 3D model — selected units highlight in the building, clicking triggers a cinematic camera fly-to.
slides.screenshot_instructions: Capture: (1) Units browser with unit cards visible, (2) Unit detail drawer open with full specs.

slides.title: 3D Interior Walkthroughs
slides.headline: Step Inside Before It's Built
features: Cinematic loading transition with progress bar
Edit Interior mode — customize furnishings in real-time
Time of day & weather controls inside the apartment
Print brochure with unit specs and floor plan
Request a quote directly from interior view
Smooth exit transition back to exterior
slides.speaker_notes: The Premium Package enables full interior walkthroughs. A cinematic transition plays while the interior loads. Inside, users explore freely with WASD/mouse controls, see their position on a floor plan overlay, customize furnishings, change lighting, print brochures, or request quotes.
slides.screenshot_instructions: Capture interior mode with furnished apartment, floor plan overlay visible, and action buttons panel.

slides.title: Unit Comparison
slides.headline: Compare Units Side-by-Side
features: Select up to 6 units for comparison
Floating compare bar at bottom of screen
Side-by-side specs: surface, rooms, floor, price, features
Compare from unit cards or detail drawer
slides.speaker_notes: Our comparison tool lets buyers select up to 6 units and view all specs side-by-side. The floating compare bar provides persistent access while browsing. This dramatically reduces decision-making time.
slides.screenshot_instructions: Capture: (1) Compare floating bar with 3 units selected, (2) Full compare panel open with side-by-side specs.

slides.title: Surroundings & Map Integration
slides.headline: Explore the Neighborhood
features: POI categories: Dining, Shopping, Education, Healthcare, Transport, Entertainment
Category filter toggles with result counts
POI cards with name, rating, address, description
POI data sent to Unreal Engine for 3D marker spawning
Real POI data fetched from Google Places API and cached
slides.speaker_notes: The Surroundings feature lets buyers explore the neighborhood. POI data is fetched from Google Places API, cached for performance, and displayed on both a 2D Mapbox map and as 3D markers in the Unreal Engine scene.
slides.screenshot_instructions: Capture Surroundings page with map visible and several POI categories active.

slides.title: Parking & Commercial Spaces
slides.headline: Beyond Apartments
features: Dedicated Parking Browser with spot filtering
Same powerful filtering as apartment browser
Availability tracking for all space types
slides.speaker_notes: Our platform handles parking spots and commercial spaces with the same powerful browsing and filtering. Each space type gets its own browser panel, and clicking any item focuses the 3D camera on its location.

slides.title: AI Chatbot — DinoBot
slides.headline: Your AI Real Estate Assistant
features: Streaming AI responses via backend functions
Smart actions: 'Show me 2-bedroom apartments under €200k' → auto-filters
Glassmorphic chat UI with typing indicators
slides.speaker_notes: DinoBot understands natural language and takes actions — asking 'Show me 3-bedroom apartments' auto-navigates to Units and applies filters. Voice input makes it hands-free. Streaming responses feel natural.

slides.title: Accessibility & Internationalization
slides.headline: Built for Everyone
features: Adjustable font size with live preview
UI mode toggle for visual preferences
Full accessibility panel with all controls
slides.speaker_notes: Accessibility includes font size controls, voice recognition, text-to-speech, and UI mode toggle. The entire interface is available in 4 languages with every UI element translated.

slides.title: Interactive Tutorial & Onboarding
slides.headline: Guided First Experience
features: Highlighted UI elements with descriptive tooltips
Covers: sidebar, camera, units, filters, compare, surroundings, parking, weather, time
slides.speaker_notes: First-time users get an interactive tutorial highlighting each UI element. Covers all major features across 12+ steps. Restartable anytime via the sidebar button.

slides.title: Technical Architecture
slides.headline: React + Unreal Engine 5

architecture.frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Framer Motion
architecture.ai: Streaming AI chatbot via edge functions

bridge_events: TO UE: focusUnit, focusSection, highlightUnit, setTimeOfDay, setWeather, setCameraView, enterInterior, exitInterior, sendPOIData, filterPOIs
FROM UE: unitSelected, unitHovered, sectionChanged, cameraReady, interiorReady, timeChanged, weatherChanged
slides.speaker_notes: Hybrid architecture: React UI communicates with Unreal Engine 5 through a custom JavaScript bridge. Events flow bidirectionally. Mock mode enables full browser testing without UE running.

slides.title: Packages & Pricing

packages.name: Base Package
packages.subtitle: 3D Building View
packages.description: Immersive 3D visualization of the building, home, or villa complex.
features: Rotate, zoom, explore from all angles

packages.name: Standard Package
packages.subtitle: Surroundings & Details
packages.description: Everything in Base, plus neighborhood exploration.

packages.name: Advanced Package
packages.subtitle: Apartment Filtering
packages.description: Everything in Standard, plus smart unit browsing.
features: Filter by size, price, floor, orientation

packages.name: Premium Package
packages.subtitle: 3D Interior Walkthroughs
packages.description: Everything in Advanced, plus full interior experiences.

slides.speaker_notes: Four tiers matching different needs. Each builds on the previous. All include multilingual support, accessibility, and tutorial. Pricing based on building count, complexity, and custom requirements.

slides.title: Get Started
slides.headline: Ready to Transform Your Property Marketing?
slides.speaker_notes: Visit our website to fill out the estimate form. Tell us about your project, select a package, and we'll send a tailored proposal.
